zh.lifeSummary: 當Jaakko Andreaanpoika於大約1300年出生在芬蘭圖爾庫 亞 波里奧藍德塔波爾斯塔霍爾姆時，他的父親Andris Andrisson af Bolstaholm32歲，母親Margareta till Dalkarby32歲。他和Jaakontytär至少有1個女兒。他去世於1347年在瑞典維亞斯特爾波頓奧藍德享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jaakko
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

historicEvents.title: The Hatuna Games
historicEvents.description: A conflict on September 29, 1306, between Birger, King of Sweden, and his brothers, the dukes Eric Magnusson and Valdemar Magnusson is known as The Hatuna Games. The brothers arrived to a party late in the night at King Birger's estate. The dukes captured and imprisoned Birger and his wife in Nykoping Castle's dungeon. Duke Eric then gained power over Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When Jaakko Andreaanpoika was born about 1300, in Bolstaholm, Geta, Åland, Turku ja Pori, Finland, his father, Andris Andrisson af Bolstaholm, was 32 and his mother, Margareta till Dalkarby, was 32. He had at least 1 daughter with Jaakontytär. He died in 1347, in Åland, Västerbotten, Sweden, at the age of 48.

Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Jaakontytär. Il est décédé en 1347, à Åland, Västerbotten, Suède, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jaakko Andreaanpoika(이)가 대략 1300년 핀란드 터르쿠 자 포리 a랜드 짓아 볼스타홀름에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andris Andrisson af Bolstaholm(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareta till Dalkarby(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Jaakontytär(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 스웨덴 브a스터벗텐 a랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jaakko Andreaanpoika nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Bolstaholm, Geta, Åland, Turku ja Pori, Finlândia, seu pai, Andris Andrisson af Bolstaholm, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margareta till Dalkarby, tinha 32 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jaakko Andreaanpoika родился около 1300 г. в местности болстахолм, джета, Аландские острова, турку джа пори, Финляндия, его отцу по имени Andris Andrisson af Bolstaholm было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margareta till Dalkarby, 32. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Jaakontytär. Он умер в 1347 г. в местности aланд, вaстирботтен, Швеция в возрасте 48 лет.
